notes:
Pokémon FireRed (Chinese). Player RED, rival 小绿.
TEAM: Ivysaur Lv18 35/54 (almost ALL PP gone: only Poison Powder usable), Pidgey Lv7 0/23 FAINTED, Pikachu Lv8 14/24 (Thunder Shock ~8PP left!, Growl, Tail Whip, NEW: Thunder Wave).
ITEMS: 3 Potions, 3 Antidotes, 1 Paralyze Heal, 6 Poké Balls. Money ~1670元. Have TM39. RUNNING SHOES (hold B).
MILESTONE: Brock beaten (Boulder Badge). Route 3 trainers beaten: Bug Catcher #1, Youngster 弘人, Lass 美奈, Bug Catcher 弘之 (all 4 mons).
CRITICAL: Team battered — AVOID ALL battles & grass. MUST reach Pokémon Center near Mt. Moon (Route 4) to heal HP+PP.
LOCATION: Route 3, just finished 弘之 battle. NEXT: head EAST along north path → Route 4 → Pokémon Center (near Mt. Moon) → heal → Mt. Moon → Cerulean. Avoid remaining trainers.
LESSON: Ledges one-way (south) - don't hop down. Poison-types immune to Poison Powder.
BAG: Items pocket (道具) = 2 lefts from Poké Ball pocket; Potion is 2nd item.
BATTLE tips: single A thru text. Switch prompt after enemy KO: 否 = bottom, down+A (if party opens press B).
summary:
**Progress summary:**

**Location:** Route 3, east end near cliffs (en route to Route 4 / Mt. Moon Pokémon Center). Mid-battle vs **Bug Catcher 三树**.

**Battle state:** His Caterpie Lv11 (1st mon) just fainted to my Poison Powder stall. He is now sending out his **next Pokémon** (message "三树要派..." just shown; pressed A — a "switch Pokémon?" prompt may appear next: 否 = bottom option, press down+A; if party screen opens press B to stay in). My **Ivysaur Lv18, 22/54 HP** is out; its only usable move is **Poison Powder (18/35 PP)** — cursor defaults to it.

**Strategy that works:** Poison Powder the new mon once, then keep pressing A in batches of ~5 (repeat Poison Powder attempts fail harmlessly while poison ticks ~1/8 per turn). Caterpie's String Shot/Tackle did little damage. NOTE: if his next mon is a **Weedle/Kakuna/Beedrill (Poison-type), Poison Powder won't work** — then switch to Pikachu (Lv8, 14/24, Thunder Shock ~8PP) via 宝可梦 menu. Heal Ivysaur with Potion (背包 → 道具 pocket = 2 lefts, Potion 2nd item) if it drops below ~12 HP.

**Team:** Ivysaur Lv18 22/54 (Poison Powder only), Pidgey Lv7 FAINTED, Pikachu Lv8 14/24 (Thunder Shock ~8PP, Thunder Wave). Items: 3 Potions, 3 Antidotes, 6 Poké Balls, ~1670元. Boulder Badge won. Route 3 trainers beaten so far: Bug Catcher #1, 弘人, 美奈, 弘之.

**Immediate next:** Finish this battle (poison-stall each mon; he likely has ~3). Then continue east/south around the cliff column to **Route 4 → Pokémon Center** for a full heal before Mt. Moon. Avoid all grass and remaining trainers.
